title: Joe creeps out from the bush — silent fourth-wall wink
prompt: Low-angle dramatic shot in @backyard-grill-area — the picnic table on the LEFT, the empty grill on the RIGHT, sunny afternoon. @Joe (small fluffy off-white Pomeranian, fox-like face, perky triangle ears, bushy curling tail) already CENTER-FRAME, slowly creeping out from behind the leafy bushes at the property edge, low to the ground, ears perked forward, nose twitching dramatically, his eyes laser-locked on @burger-platter (now on the picnic table loaded with three plump grilled hot dogs and four juicy grill-marked hamburger patties). Joe pauses mid-step. He turns his head SLOWLY toward the camera, makes direct eye contact with the lens for two full seconds with a tiny sparkle of conspiratorial mischief in his eyes, gives one slow deliberate blink — a silent fourth-wall acknowledgment to the kid watching at home — then turns back to the platter and resumes his low slinky stalk. Joe (a small low cheerful conspiratorial yip to himself): "Mff hff hff!" Tail wags slowly with criminal intent.
